title: Mozilla Security Advisories - 2026-04-21
description:
Merged 5 mozilla security advisories published on 2026-04-21. Original advisory IDs: MFSA2026-31, MFSA2026-30, MFSA2026-33, MFSA2026-32, MFSA2026-34

Titles:
- MFSA 2026-31Security Vulnerabilities fixed in Firefox ESR 115.35
- MFSA 2026-30Security Vulnerabilities fixed in Firefox 150
- MFSA 2026-33Security Vulnerabilities fixed in Thunderbird 150
- MFSA 2026-32Security Vulnerabilities fixed in Firefox ESR 140.10
- MFSA 2026-34Security Vulnerabilities fixed in Thunderbird 140.10

cves.title: CVE-2026-2781
cves.description: Integer overflow in the Libraries component in NSS. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 148, Firefox ESR 140.8, Thunderbird 148, Thunderbird 140.8, and Firefox ESR 115.35.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6746
cves.description: Use-after-free in the DOM: Core & HTML component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 115.35, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6747
cves.description: Use-after-free in the WebRTC component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6748
cves.description: Uninitialized memory in the Audio/Video: Web Codecs component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6749
cves.description: Information disclosure due to uninitialized memory in the Graphics: Canvas2D component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 115.35, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6750
cves.description: Privilege escalation in the Graphics: WebRender component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 115.35, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6751
cves.description: Uninitialized memory in the Audio/Video: Web Codecs component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6752
cves.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the WebRTC component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 115.35, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6753
cves.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the WebRTC component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6754
cves.description: Use-after-free in the JavaScript Engine component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 115.35, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6755
cves.description: Mitigation bypass in the DOM: postMessage component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150 and Thunderbird 150.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6756
cves.description: Mitigation bypass in Firefox for Android. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6757
cves.description: Invalid pointer in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6758
cves.description: Use-after-free in the JavaScript: WebAssembly component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150 and Thunderbird 150.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6759
cves.description: Use-after-free in the Widget: Cocoa component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6760
cves.description: Mitigation bypass in the Networking: Cookies component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150 and Thunderbird 150.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6761
cves.description: Privilege escalation in the Networking component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6762
cves.description: Spoofing issue in the DOM: Core & HTML component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 115.35, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6763
cves.description: Mitigation bypass in the File Handling component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6764
cves.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the DOM: Device Interfaces component. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6765

cves.title: CVE-2026-6766
cves.description: Incorrect boundary conditions in the Libraries component in NSS. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.

cves.title: CVE-2026-6770

cves.title: CVE-2026-6785
cves.description: Memory safety bugs present in Firefox ESR 115.34, Firefox ESR 140.9, Thunderbird ESR 140.9, Firefox 149 and Thunderbird 149. Some of these bugs showed evidence of memory corruption and we presume that with enough effort some of these could have been exploited to run arbitrary code. This vulnerability was fixed in Firefox 150, Firefox ESR 115.35, Firefox ESR 140.10, Thunderbird 150, and Thunderbird 140.10.
